tests.name: B12
tests.notes: <200 deficient. Some labs use ng/L (same numbers)

tests.name: Ομοκυστεΐνη
tests.notes: Elevated in B12/folate deficiency. >15 mildly elevated, >30 significantly

ocr_traps.B12_garbled: Google garbles B12 values — '812146.420' could be 'B12: 446,20'. Separate test name from value carefully
ocr_traps.Folate_decimal: Folate 30 (ng/mL) is high but possible with supplements. 3,0 is low-normal. Check for decimal comma
ocr_traps.Homocysteine_garbled: Google reads 'ομοκυστεΐνη' as 'ομοκυστεΐνης'. Value 18,0 is mildly elevated. 80 would be extreme (possible but rare)
